articles.title: Uncle Sam is wrong, India and China are doing their bit to fight climate change
articles.summary: It is true that there is an increase in carbon emission by India and China due to homegrown consumption and lack of infrastructure. But let s keep in mind that India s carbon emissions per capita are still 10 times lower and China s is half of that compared to the US.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: FPI outflows persist in equities; primary market sees continued interest
articles.summary: In 2026, IPO activity is subdued with few listings, while Foreign Portfolio Investors (FPIs) invested ₹12,339 crore in the primary market. Despite significant outflows from equities, FPIs are attracted to primary issues due to appealing valuations and yield prospects.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: BSE SME stock rebounds after announcement of H2 results 2026
articles.summary: Harshdeep Hortico Limited's stock rose 9% to ₹100 following positive H2FY26 results, with revenue increasing nearly 15% year-on-year. The company reported improved EBITDA and a 25% rise in net profit, reflecting strong financial performance.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Gold, silver prices outlook: Where are bullion prices headed this month?
articles.summary: Gold, Silver prices outlook: Persistent inflation and expectations of delayed interest rate cuts may cap the upside in gold prices in the near term. However, ongoing geopolitical tensions and steady physical demand are likely to provide underlying support.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.title: Bank Nifty falls 8% in 2026 so far: Is this correction a buying opportunity?
articles.summary: As Bank Nifty faces an 8% decline in 2026, experts debate whether this downturn presents a buying opportunity for investors. While some advise caution, others highlight the attractive entry points for select banking stocks amidst ongoing market volatility and regulatory changes.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Aditya Birla Capital Q4 Results: Profit rises 31% YoY to ₹1,129 crore
articles.summary: Aditya Birla Capital Q4 Results: Aditya Birla Capital reported a 30.6% increase in Q4 consolidated net profit to ₹1,129.16 crore, with total income rising to ₹13,475.74 crore. The lending portfolio expanded 32%, while the direct-to-consumer platform onboarded 1.1 crore customers by March 2026.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.summary: Ambuja Cement Q4 results: Net profit rises 78% YoY to ₹1,830 crore. Ambuja Cement share price was marginally up, rose over 0.39% to ₹445 apiece on NSE.

articles.title: April manufacturing PMI: is the uptick temporary?
articles.summary: The manufacturing PMI recovered mildly in April to 54.7 from a four-year low, driven partly by pre-emptive inventory building ahead of price hikes rather than genuine demand.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Himadri Speciality shares jump 6% to hit a 52-week high after a 38% rise in April amid focus on revenue growth
articles.summary: Himadri Speciality Chemicals shares surged 6% to reach a 52-week high, driven by a 38% increase in April. With plans to double profits by FY28 and expand into high-margin segments, the company is set to redefine its market position and reduce India's import dependence in key chemical sectors.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Tamil Nadu election results impact: Why have Sun TV Network shares crashed over 9% today?
articles.summary: Sun TV, part of the Sun Group, is led by Indian billionaire media proprietor Kalanithi Maran — who is closely related to DMK leaders. Maran is the grandnephew of DMK president M Karunanidhi and nephew of the current chief minister MK Stalin.
articles.label: NEUTRAL

articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: 1,400% returns in five years! Multibagger small-cap stock Spice Lounge hits upper circuit
articles.summary: Spice Lounge Food Works share price has fallen 23% in one month and has declined 28% in three months. The smallcap has dropped 46% on a year-to-date (YTD) basis, while it has plunged 63% in six months.

articles.title: Vinay Rajani of HDFC Sec suggests Tata Steel, Linde India shares to buy

articles.title: BHEL Q4 results 2026: Profit jumps nearly threefold to ₹1,290 crore; declares a final dividend of ₹1.40 for FY26
articles.summary: BHEL Q4 results 2026: Profit jumped 156% year-on-year, or nearly threefold (2.6 times), to ₹1,290.47 crore. Revenue from operations for Q4FY26 saw a 37% YoY jump to ₹12,310.37 crore.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Small-cap pharma stock under ₹50 jumps 4% following Dalal Street rally
articles.summary: Sudarshan Pharma Industries saw a 4% stock price increase after reporting a 44.8% rise in Q4 net profit to ₹10.73 crore and a 36.72% revenue growth to ₹220.92 crore. For the year, net profit rose 55.64% and sales climbed 39.21%.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: DMart shares tumble 4% after Q4 results, wipe off ₹9,300 crore from Radhakishan Damani & other promoters' wealth
articles.summary: Radhakishan Damani and other promoters of the company who cumulatively hold a 74.51% stake in the company, lost ₹9332 crore in notional wealth within minutes amid the decline in the counter.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Nifty may oscillate between 23,500 and 24,500 this week, likely to remain range-bound in near term
articles.summary: With geopolitical risks still unresolved and inflation concerns lingering, markets are expected to remain range-bound in the near term, with the Nifty likely to oscillate between 23,500 and 24,500 levels, with a mixed bias.

articles.title: This drone maker stock rallies 17% to 52-week high on strong Q4 results. Do you own?
articles.summary: ideaForge share price hit a 52-week high on Monday, 4 May, after the company reported strong Q4 results. The company returned to black in Q4 FY26 while its revenue surged sevenfold.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Sensex gains 350 points, Nifty 50 ends above 24,100; investors earn ₹4 lakh crore
articles.summary: The 30-share pack Sensex closed 356 points, or 0.46%, higher at 77,269.40, while the NSE barometer Nifty 50 rose by 122 points, or 0.51%, to close at 24,119.30.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Ola Electric share price jumps over 3% as April registrations climb 20% MoM
articles.summary: Ola Electric Mobility shares increased over 3% on May 4 after reporting a 20% rise in April registrations, from 10,133 to 12,166 units. This growth occurred despite a 22% decline in the overall electric two-wheeler market, highlighting strong consumer confidence and demand for Ola's EV lineup.
articles.label: BULLISH

articles.title: Crude oil price steadies amid US-Iran war uncertainty. Where's it headed in near term?
articles.summary: US-Iran war: MCX crude oil prices rose marginally amid no peace agreement and continued disruptions to traffic through the Strait of Hormuz. Analysts said the near-term bias is cautious and contingent on headline-driven developments in the Middle East war.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Gold, silver prices today: Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, 999 silver on 4 May in Delhi, Mumbai, Kolkata, others
articles.summary: On 4 May, gold prices in India remained stable, and silver prices also showed limited movement as traders await clarity on the US-Iran peace deal. Check retail rates of 24K, 22K gold, and 999 silver in your city.

articles.title: Gold rate declines on MCX amid persisting inflation worries; US-Iran talks remain in focus
articles.summary: Gold price today: Gold rate declined on the MCX in morning deals on Monday, 4 May, amid an uptick in the US dollar and persisting concerns over a spike in inflation due to higher-for-longer crude oil prices.

articles.title: Rupee opens 4 paise lower at 94.95 against US dollar
articles.summary: The Indian rupee opened weaker at 94.95 against the US dollar, influenced by fluctuating oil prices and ongoing U.S.–Iran negotiations. Brent crude prices fell amid U.S. intervention efforts for stranded ships, while the rupee has dropped nearly 2% over the past eight days.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.title: Distributors skirt SIF certification norms as talent shortage bites
articles.summary: Unqualified sub-brokers are reportedly selling specialized investment funds, violating regulations as the segment faces a lack of certified sellers. This practice will likely concern Sebi, which will then hold asset management companies accountable, regulatory experts said.
articles.label: BEARISH

articles.summary: Bitcoin rose above $80,000 for the first time in more than three months as Asian stocks approached record highs.

articles.title: Aluminum Gains as Trump Vows to Maintain Naval Blockade on Iran
articles.summary: Aluminum gained, with traders seeing little prospect of an imminent opening of the Strait of Hormuz that would ease availability of the metal.

articles.title: Rural job demand under MGNREGS falls by over a third in April
articles.summary: The decline in rural work demand in April may be a continuation of similar declines seen over the past few months, though it could also reflect implementation challenges with the VB G-RAM-G.

articles.title: Oil slips after Trump says US will help free ships stranded in Strait of Hormuz
articles.summary: Oil prices fell on Monday after President Trump announced efforts to free stranded ships in the Strait of Hormuz, yet remained above $100 due to ongoing U.S.-Iran tensions. Brent crude dropped to $107.53, while U.S. West Texas Intermediate fell to $101.10 amid stalled peace negotiations.
articles.label: BULLISH
